evidence_gaps: No raw tool entry directly introduces the ShipsEar or DeepShip dataset; dataset_candidates left empty to avoid fabrication.
Arxiv arXiv:2506.07877 (AUV source tracking) and arXiv:0809.0070 (underwater channel network coding) were excluded as cross-domain false positives for classification.
OpenAlex backend returned 0 results; cannot corroborate baselines via OpenAlex citations.
Several crossref entries lack abstracts and years; treated as borderline-relevant and kept only the clearly classification-related ones.
